executives.name: Cor Coe
executives.background: Mr. Coe is a Professional Geologist (P.Geo.) and a Mining Technologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has been involved in all aspects of mineral exploration and development, from project generation to mine production. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies.

executives.name: Donald Penner
executives.background: Mr. Penner is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He has worked for both major and junior mining companies and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies.

executives.name: William Sheriff
executives.background: Mr. Sheriff is the Executive Chairman of the Company. He has over 30 years of experience in the minerals industry and was a co-founder of Energy Metals Corp. and served as its Chairman and CEO.

board_of_directors.name: William Sheriff
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sheriff is the Executive Chairman of the Company. He has over 30 years of experience in the minerals industry and was a co-founder of Energy Metals Corp. and served as its Chairman and CEO.
